statement: In every magma, Equation 2999 (`x = ((y * (z * y)) * z) * y`) implies Equation 154 (`x = (x * x) * (y * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0135
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z y)) z) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x x) (op y y))
